summary: Message repository implementation for storing and retrieving Telegram messages
side_effects: Database operations (INSERT with deduplication, SELECT queries)
notes: Implements MessageRepository interface. Create() uses ON CONFLICT(channel_id, telegram_msg_id) DO NOTHING for automatic deduplication of duplicate messages. GetDistinctDates uses SUBSTR to extract date portion from sent_at timestamp (works around potential SQLite DATE() parsing issues with Go time format). All retrieval methods support time-based filtering.
